name: Nightshade Stockings
outcome: Ushris lifts up both of her dainty stockinged feet and presses them down on your hapless face, flooding your senses with her creamy caramel fragrance while she affectionately massages your face, teasing your nose with her nimble toes, ensuring all you can breathe is her mind-melting scent, meeting your open mouth with a sinfully soft sole, coaxing you to instinctively lick it, sending an intoxicating tingle through your entire body.
miss: Ushris lifts up both of her dainty stockinged feet and presses them down on your hapless face, flooding your senses with her creamy caramel fragrance while she affectionately massages your face, but [TargetName] grits [TargetHisOrHer] teeth and ignores the pleasure.
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s body feels increasingly numb and unresponsive as the hellhound woman's perfumed scent and cloying taste stalls up [TargetHisOrHer] brain with primitive, horny need...
